steps.subject: H B Barbershop
steps.body:
Hi,

I saw your Google rating is 4.8/5 with 31 reviews — that’s great! I built you a new website to match that reputation. Here it is: https://h-h-b-barbershop-504967.netlify.app

It’s simple, mobile-friendly, and includes real reviews plus a contact form. If you like it, it’s just £29/month and you can cancel anytime.

Here’s the payment link if you want to get started: https://buy.stripe.com/test_5kQ9AU7KUffS5LAcvddQQ05

Cheers,
Fraser

steps.subject: re: H B Barbershop
steps.body:

Worth a look if you haven’t seen it yet: https://h-h-b-barbershop-504967.netlify.app

If you like it, here’s the link to get started: https://buy.stripe.com/test_5kQ9AU7KUffS5LAcvddQQ05

steps.subject: Quick question about H B Barbershop
steps.body:
Hi,

I built this site just for H B Barbershop, but if you’re not interested I’ll reassign the design to someone else soon.

No pressure, just wanted to be upfront. If you want to move forward, here’s the link again: https://buy.stripe.com/test_5kQ9AU7KUffS5LAcvddQQ05

Thanks for your time,
Fraser
